data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Ammonia Fountain Demonstration" goal="Demonstrate the high solubility of ammonia gas in water and the resulting pressure drop by observing the ammonia fountain effect and color change with phenolphthalein." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="flask_1" type="round_bottom_flask" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="rubber_stopper_with_tube" type="rubber_stopper_with_tube" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Ammonia_Gas" state="gas" />
      <Reagent name="Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Phenolphthalein_Solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="flask_1" reagent="NH3" volume="fill" id="step_0" />
      
      <Insert tool="rubber_stopper_with_tube" vessel="flask_1" id="step_1" />
      
      <Attach vessel="flask_1" support="stand_1" id="step_2" />
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="150 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="C20H14O4" volume="2 mL" id="step_4" />
      
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_5" />
      
      <Insert tool="rubber_stopper_with_tube" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_6" />
      
      <Wait time="5s" id="step_7" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装氨气发生装置并充入氨气：将氨气充满圆底烧瓶，塞上带导管的橡皮塞，并将装置固定在铁架台上。
配制酚酞指示剂溶液：在烧杯中加入水和酚酞溶液，制备用于氨水喷泉的显色溶液。
连接装置并观察氨水喷泉现象：等待片刻后，将带导管的橡皮塞插入烧杯，观察氨气溶于水导致的喷泉和颜色变化。
